Component.Name: GroupByOperNumHeaderFlexLayout

Component.Name: MainFlexLayout
Component.LayoutAttributes: TYPE(VerticalBox) AUTOSIZE(0) REGION0(ID: UNKNOWN0; VALUE: 3.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: PageHeader) REGION1(ID: UNKNOWN1; VALUE: 17.5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(DisplayHeader) = "1"; SECTYPE: ReportHeader; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION2(ID: UNKNOWN2; VALUE: 0.1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: 1 = 2; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; RPTNP: True) REGION3(ID: UNKNOWN3; VALUE: 2.5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; ANIM: FromCenter; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: JobSuffix; RPTNP: True; GROW: True) REGION4(ID: UNKNOWN4; VALUE: 3; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; ANIM: FromCenter; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: JobSuffix; RSTPGNUM: True; GROW: True) REGION5(ID: UNKNOWN5_SITE; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: JobSuffix) REGION6(ID: UNKNOWN5; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: JobSuffix; SUBFRM: JobCoproductReportViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(Job=P(JobPrefix), pSite=V(pSite), Suffix=P(JobSuffix)) )) REGION7(ID: UNKNOWN6; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(IsRouting) <> "1"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: JobSuffix; SUBFRM: CfgAttrReportViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(Job=P(JobPrefix), Suffix=P(JobSuffix), PrintConDetail=V(PrintConDetail)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION8(ID: UNKNOWN7; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: JobSuffix) REGION9(ID: UNKNOWN8; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(IsRouting) = "1" & #P(BcOperNum) <> "0"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: BcOperNum; GROW: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION10(ID: UNKNOWN9; VALUE: 3; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(HideOperBar) = "0"; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: BcOperNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION11(ID: UNKNOWN10; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintJobRouteNotes) = "1"; MARGIN: 3,0,0,0; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: BcOperNum; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(JobrouteRowpointer), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternal), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternal)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION12(ID: UNKNOWN12; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(Type) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: BcOperNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION13(ID: UNKNOWN13; VALUE: 0.15; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(Type) <> ""; SECTYPE: GroupHeader; GRPPROP: BcOperNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION14(ID: UNKNOWN14; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(Type) <> ""; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION15(ID: UNKNOWN21; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: 1=2; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; PRTBOT: True) REGION16(ID: UNKNOWN16_SITE; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: 1=2; SECTYPE: DetailFooter; COLLCTX: object) REGION17(ID: UNKNOWN15; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PrintJobMatlNotes) = "1"; MARGIN: 8,0,0,0; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; GROW: True; SUBFRM: ReportNotesViewer; SUBPRM: ( SETVARVALUES(RowPointer=P(JobmatlRowpointer), ShowInternal=V(PrintInternal), ShowExternal=V(PrintExternal)) ); VISINDESIGN: True) REGION18(ID: UNKNOWN16; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(RefDesignator) <> "" | #P(BubbleNum) <> "" | #P(AssemblySeq) <> "" & #V(DisplayRef) = "1" & #P(ShowHeader) = "1"; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION19(ID: UNKNOWN17; VALUE: 0.15; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(RefDesignator) <> "" | #P(BubbleNum) <> "" | #P(AssemblySeq) <> "" & #V(DisplayRef) = "1" & #P(ShowHeader) = "1"; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION20(ID: UNKNOWN18; VALUE: 1.25; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #P(RefDesignator) <> "" | #P(BubbleNum) <> "" | #P(AssemblySeq) <> "" & #V(DisplayRef) = "1"; SECTYPE: Detail; COLLCTX: object; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION21(ID: UNKNOWN25_SITE; VALUE: 45; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(HIL_Rework) = 1; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION22(ID: UNKNOWN21_SITE; VALUE: 0.1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(HIL_Rework) <> 1; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; BRKAFT: True) REGION23(ID: UNKNOWN19; VALUE: 0.1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(PageOpera) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: BcOperNum; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION24(ID: UNKNOWN0_SITE; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(BG_CURPAGE) = 2 | #V(BG_CURPAGE) = 4; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; BRKAFT: True) REGION25(ID: UNKNOWN1_SITE; VALUE: 1; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(HIL_ProductCode) = "FG-FH" & #V(HIL_Rework) <> 1; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION26(ID: UNKNOWN20_SITE; VALUE: 60; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(HIL_ProductCode) = "FG-TH" | #V(HIL_ProductCode) = "SA" & #V(HIL_PreassignSerials) = "1"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; PRTBOT: True; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION27(ID: UNKNOWN22_SITE; VALUE: 60; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(HIL_ProductCode) = "FG-CH" & #V(HIL_Rework) <> 1; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; PRTBOT: True; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION28(ID: UNKNOWN23_SITE; VALUE: 60; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(HIL_ProductCode) = "FG-B" | #V(HIL_ProductCode) = "FG-O"; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; PRTBOT: True; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION29(ID: UNKNOWN24_SITE; VALUE: 0; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: 1=2; SECTYPE: GroupFooter; GRPPROP: JobPrefix; BRKAFT: True; VISINDESIGN: True) REGION30(ID: UNKNOWN30_SITE; VALUE: 5; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(BG_CURPAGE) <> 1 & #V(HIL_Rework) <> 1; SECTYPE: PageFooter) REGION31(ID: UNKNOWN20; VALUE: 2.6; ORIEN: Fill; ; PACK: Start; BORDER: Enable; EXPVIS: #V(BG_CURPAGE) = 1; SECTYPE: PageFooter; VISINDESIGN: True) INDEX(0)

Component.Name: static16_SITE
Component.Caption: CHECK BACK FOR CONT'D MATERIALS
Component.Post301Format: FONT(12,0,0,0,700,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0,Microsoft Sans Serif) BACKCOLOR(TYPE=0; ARGB=[255, 255,255,0];) JUSTIFY(C) THEMECLASS(G2Header)

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SlSerials( FILTER(RefNum = FP(JobPrefix) AND RefLine = FP(JobSuffix)) SETV(HIL_SerialNumber=SerNum) )

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLJobs( FILTER(Job = FP(JobPrefix) AND Suffix = FP(JobSuffix)) SETV(HIL_JobStartDate=JschStartDate,HIL_Rework=Rework,HIL_PreassignSerials=PreassignSerials) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SLReportNotesViews( CA(RNCSDVIOG) OBJNAME(SLReportNotesViews) FILTERPERM(Description=N'EEE') RECORDCAP(0) PARENTCOLL(object) ) )

Variable.Name: fds_SC3
Variable.Value: OBJECT3( SLReportNotesViews( CA(DIGVNORS) OBJNAME(SLReportNotesViews) FILTERPERM(Description=N'EEE') RECORDCAP(0) PARENTCOLL(object) ) )

Variable.Name: fds1_PrimaryMethodParms
Variable.Value: PARMS(VAR V(StartJob), VAR V(EndJob), VAR V(StartSuffix), VAR V(EndSuffix), VAR V(JobStat), VAR V(StartItem), VAR V(EndItem), VAR V(StartProdMix), VAR V(EndProdMix), VAR V(StartJobDate), VAR V(EndJobDate), VAR V(StartOpera), VAR V(EndOpera), VAR V(OperDate), VAR V(OperHour), VAR V(OperBarcode), VAR V(PrintConDetail), VAR V(PrintBCFmt), VAR V(PageOpera), VAR V(DisplayRef), VAR V(StartJobDateOffset), VAR V(EndJobDateOffset), VAR V(PrintInternal), VAR V(PrintExternal), VAR V(PrintJobRouteNotes), VA
Variable.Value2: R V(PrintJobMatlNotes), VAR V(DisplayHeader), VAR, VAR V(pSite))
